subject: [PATCH v4 13/14] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftests suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous RWP modes, page mapping, mprotect operations, and fork behavior. The tests are designed to ensure that UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT work correctly in different memory types, such as anonymous, shared memory, and huge pages. The patch includes 11 test cases that verify the functionality of RWP under various conditions.
